description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unit-tests that runs on every push. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test with multiple Python versions (2.7, 3.6, 3.7, 3.8). For each version, check out the repository, set up Python, install dependencies including graphviz and those listed in requirements.txt, run unit tests with pytest and coverage, and upload the coverage report to codecov.io using a token from secrets.
